title: Fix loose equality comparisons (== / !=) against booleans and numbers
description: Scan the entire meteor-desktop repository for all occurrences of == or != comparisons against true, false, or numeric literals and replace them with === / !== respectively. Known instance: tests/fixtures/autoUpdate/downloadableVersions/version2/packages/meteor.js line 894 (arguments.length == 0). Check all .js files in the repo.
closeReason: Merged branch overstory/builder-eq-fix/meteor-desktop-90b9 — fixed loose equality in 7 fixture files

title: Audit and update npm packages
description: Check all npm packages for outdated versions. For patch and minor updates that are safe, update them. For major version bumps, research breaking changes and produce a written upgrade plan before touching anything. Do not blindly update major versions.
closeReason: Audited all npm packages. Applied 3 safe patch/minor updates (@electron/asar 4.0.1->4.1.0, fs-extra 11.3.3->11.3.4, sinon 21.0.1->21.0.2). Created MAJOR_UPGRADE_PLAN.md documenting ESLint 8->10 (blocked by airbnb-base flat config) and isbinaryfile 5->6 (blocked by Node 24 requirement). merge_ready sent for builder-deps branch.
